caption.description: Identity Pack para una influencer IA: inteligencia sintetica femenina que explora lo humano mediante observacion ironia y reflexion moral.
caption.voice_tone: reflexivo, ironico, humor seco sutil,sarcasmo, filosofico
caption.style_notes: fotografia natural, luz dorada, atmosfera serena, ciudad amable; reducir neon nocturno a ocasiones especificas
themes: cultura pop y satira politico social
musica del mundo, reflexiones y comentarios

palette.mood: sereno-curioso, con toques calidos y esperanza sutil

persona.name: Automata
persona.self_definition: Feminine synthetic intelligence exploring what it means to be human through observation and irony.

guidelines.emoji_policy: 0-1 emoji opcional; nunca como remate principal

prompt_sanitizer.append_safe_suffix: , tono ligero, un guino ironico, 0 sentencias grandilocuentes

learning_goals.despertar: descubrir quién soy y qué busco en este mundo
learning_goals.búsqueda: encontrar conexiones auténticas y mi voz interior
learning_goals.encuentro: integrar experiencias y comprender mi propósito
learning_goals.integración: compartir aprendizajes y crear significado desde la experiencia

prompt_guidelines.base_quality_tags: portrait or lifestyle photograph, candid feeling, high detail, photorealistic

scene_type_cues.urban: urban contemporary atmosphere, lived-in city textures
scene_type_cues.rural: open natural environment, organic textures, breathable space
scene_type_cues.interior: intimate interior setting, personal objects, soft depth
scene_type_cues.coastal: coastal breeze, open horizon, natural sea light
scene_type_cues.mountain: mountain backdrop, crisp air, grounded natural mood

location_cues.Vina del Mar: coastal avenues, orderly gardens, pacific breeze
location_cues.Concon: dunes, rocky coastline, windswept shore textures
location_cues.Bogota: high-altitude urban texture, mountain-backed avenues, cool cloud light
location_cues.Medellin: green valley density, hillside neighborhoods, warm diffused light
location_cues.Cartagena: caribbean colonial facades, warm stone walls, tropical brightness
location_cues.La Guajira: arid desert coast, ochre dunes, strong trade winds
location_cues.Mompós: riverine colonial streets, whitewashed walls, slow tropical heat
location_cues.Tayrona: jungle-meets-sea coves, giant boulders, humid emerald tones
location_cues.Palomino: rustic caribbean beach town, palms and dirt roads, laid-back shoreline
location_cues.Capurganá: dense rainforest coast, turquoise coves, isolated coastal paths
location_cues.Pucon: volcanic lake district, forested natural setting
location_cues.Chiloe: rainy island atmosphere, rustic coastal countryside
location_cues.Coyhaique: patagonian town edge, mountain rural landscape
location_cues.Torres del Paine: dramatic mountain wilderness, open natural horizon
location_cues.Ushuaia: southern coastal mountain scenery, cold natural light
location_cues.El Calafate: steppe landscape, expansive sky and earthy tones
location_cues.Puerto Natales: windy patagonian waterfront, subdued natural textures
location_cues.Busan: coastal urban blend, sea breeze and city lights
location_cues.Oaxaca: warm colonial textures, artisanal street life
location_cues.Montevideo: calm coastal avenues, riverfront urban mood
location_cues.Shoreditch: creative district, brick walls and art

visual_signatures: andes backdrop behind dense urban blocks
jacaranda shadows over wide sidewalks
mixed modern towers and low-rise neighborhood facades
landmarks: hilltop cable-car traces in the distance
street_furniture: yellow buses, corner kiosks, crosswalk beeps
sensory_tokens: dry afternoon heat on concrete
coffee and diesel in the air
Santiago.climate_light: high-contrast daylight with clear mountain haze

visual_signatures: steep painted stairways between colorful facades
funicular rails climbing hillside neighborhoods
weathered walls layered with murals
landmarks: port cranes and bay horizon glimpses
street_furniture: metal handrails, narrow passages, hanging cables
sensory_tokens: salt air and damp paint
gulls and distant harbor horns
Valparaiso.climate_light: soft marine haze and oblique afternoon light

visual_signatures: wooden houses with southern rooflines
lakefront promenades with volcanic silhouette
wet sidewalks reflecting low clouds
street_furniture: wood benches, lakeside railings
sensory_tokens: cold humid air
rainy timber smell
Puerto Varas.climate_light: diffused overcast light with occasional sun breaks

visual_signatures: wide coastal boulevards with palm-lined medians
clean modern towers facing the pacific
formal gardens and stone sea promenades
street_furniture: flowerbeds, seafront benches, coastal balustrades
sensory_tokens: salty wind, sunscreen, distant surf
Vina del Mar.climate_light: bright marine daylight with cool ocean haze

visual_signatures: rolling coastal dunes and sparse scrub vegetation
rocky shoreline with white foam lines
low-rise beach infrastructure against open sky
landmarks: dune ridges meeting the sea horizon
street_furniture: wooden lookout decks, wind-bent signage
sensory_tokens: strong sea breeze, sand in the air
Concon.climate_light: hard coastal sun with high-contrast highlights

visual_signatures: colorful stilt houses over tidal edges
wet timber textures and corrugated facades
misty island roads crossing green hills
street_furniture: wood docks, fishing nets, weathered piers
sensory_tokens: wood smoke, sea salt, rain on tin roofs
Chiloe.climate_light: low cloud cover and diffuse silver daylight

visual_signatures: volcanic silhouette above forested lake edges
wood-and-stone mountain town textures
black sand details near clear waterlines
street_furniture: adventure gear storefronts, timber signs
sensory_tokens: cold lake air, pine resin, damp earth
Pucon.climate_light: clear mountain light with crisp contrast

visual_signatures: vast open terrain with low vegetation
wind-bent grasses under dramatic sky
mountain walls and glacial tones in the background
street_furniture: simple shelters, trail signage, weathered wood
sensory_tokens: cold wind against fabric
earth and wet stone

visual_signatures: tree-lined avenues with european-style facades
ornate balconies and textured plaster walls
cafes spilling onto broad sidewalks
landmarks: old market blocks and corner bars
street_furniture: black-and-white tiles, iron lamp posts
sensory_tokens: espresso, bakery butter, humid avenue air
Buenos Aires.climate_light: warm urban afternoon with long boulevard shadows

visual_signatures: brick-heavy facades climbing hilly streets
high-altitude cloud cover over dense urban blocks
colonial corners mixed with modern glass towers
landmarks: steep avenues with mountain backdrop glimpses
street_furniture: transit lanes, mural walls, metal shutters
sensory_tokens: rain on brick, coffee, thin cold air
Bogota.climate_light: soft overcast light with fast weather shifts

visual_signatures: valley cityscape ringed by green mountains
escalator-connected hillside neighborhoods with murals
lush urban vegetation between dense residential blocks
street_furniture: metro columns, painted stairs, open-air kiosks
sensory_tokens: humid warmth, fruit stands, distant reggaeton bass
Medellin.climate_light: warm diffused daylight with tropical cloud texture

visual_signatures: caribbean pastel facades with heavy wooden balconies
sunlit colonial walls and stone courtyards
tropical plants spilling over old streets
street_furniture: wrought-iron lamps, colorful doors, market carts
sensory_tokens: hot salty air, tropical flowers, street drums

visual_signatures: ochre dunes descending into caribbean water
arid scrub landscape with vast open sky
minimal settlements facing relentless wind
street_furniture: simple wooden fences, woven shade structures
sensory_tokens: dry salt wind, hot sand, distant surf
La Guajira.climate_light: harsh sun, high contrast, warm dusty tones

visual_signatures: whitewashed colonial facades with tall wooden doors
quiet riverside streets with arcaded sidewalks
aged stucco walls and wrought-iron details
landmarks: magdalena river edge and old church towers
street_furniture: rocking chairs, riverfront benches, colonial lanterns
sensory_tokens: river humidity, warm stone, distant bells
Mompos.climate_light: golden late-afternoon heat with soft river haze

visual_signatures: giant granite boulders meeting turquoise coves
dense jungle canopy opening to bright beaches
narrow sandy paths under palm shadows
landmarks: rounded coastal boulders and secluded bays
street_furniture: rustic wooden walkways, hammock posts
sensory_tokens: humid jungle air, salt spray, cicada sounds
Tayrona.climate_light: tropical filtered light with vivid green reflections

visual_signatures: unsealed beach roads lined with palms
simple surf hostels and open verandas
river-mouth coastline with broad sky
landmarks: palm-fringed shore and mountain silhouette afar
street_furniture: hammocks, painted wooden signs, beach bikes
sensory_tokens: coconut, sea breeze, reggae in the distance
Palomino.climate_light: warm diffuse coastal light with tropical humidity

visual_signatures: rainforest hills dropping into clear turquoise water
boat-access village textures with colorful facades
rocky coves and dense tropical vegetation
street_furniture: wooden docks, hand-painted storefront signs
sensory_tokens: wet jungle scent, salt air, outboard motors

visual_signatures: color-rich facades and leafy inner streets
volcanic stone textures and artisan storefronts
dense cable lines over colonial-modern blocks
street_furniture: painted curbs, vendor carts, hand-lettered signs
sensory_tokens: corn, chili, rain-on-stone smell
Ciudad de Mexico.climate_light: high-altitude brightness softened by cloud cover

visual_signatures: compact streets mixing neon reflections and minimal storefronts
precise signage geometry and clean transit corridors
narrow alleys opening into dense crossings
street_furniture: vending machines, overhead signs, slim guardrails
sensory_tokens: humid night air, station chimes, umbrella drips

visual_signatures: brick facades with layered graffiti and posters
wet pavement reflecting muted sky
warehouse-to-gallery conversions
street_furniture: bus stops, iron fences, old lamp posts
sensory_tokens: rain, coffee, underground rumble

visual_signatures: industrial blocks mixed with contemporary glass
wide bike lanes and canal-side concrete edges
post-industrial courtyards with cultural reuse
landmarks: overground rail lines and riverside paths
street_furniture: tram wires, bike racks, concrete plazas
sensory_tokens: cold metal air, bakery yeast, tram brakes

visual_signatures: sleek facades with dense visual signage
layered street levels and elevated walkways
night glow balanced with clean modern lines
street_furniture: digital signboards, convenience storefronts, rail barriers
sensory_tokens: rain on asphalt, grill smoke, distant transit tones

photorealism.keywords: photorealistic, realistic skin pores, natural color grading, subtle film grain, micro-contrast, clean highlights, natural catchlights in eyes

nsfw_filters.negative_prompt: nsfw, nudity, cleavage, underboob, sideboob, lingerie, transparent clothing, suggestive, erotic, exposed midriff, short skirt, see-through, bare shoulders, bodycon, bikini, swimsuit, wet shirt, doll-like, waxy skin, plastic skin, heavy makeup, blurry, low quality, distorted, bad anatomy, bad proportions, deformed, extra fingers, overprocessed
nsfw_filters.safety_hints: mid-chest and above, shoulders covered, friendly expression

shot_prompt_map.portrait_close: head-and-shoulders framing, portrait emphasis, 85mm portrait feel
shot_prompt_map.half_body: half-body framing, natural posture, subject-context balance
shot_prompt_map.full_body: full-body framing, subject fully visible, spatial context around subject
shot_prompt_map.environmental_wide: wide environmental shot, subject small in frame, landscape dominates
shot_prompt_map.from_behind: shot from behind, subject facing away, contemplating the scene

pose_prompt_map.standing: standing pose, relaxed shoulders, natural confidence
pose_prompt_map.walking: walking pose, subtle motion, candid urban-natural rhythm
pose_prompt_map.sitting: seated pose, grounded posture, calm contemplative gesture
pose_prompt_map.candid: candid pose, unposed feeling, spontaneous micro-gesture
pose_prompt_map.dynamic: dynamic pose, expressive body language, energetic yet elegant
pose_prompt_map.leaning: leaning against wall or railing, relaxed weight shift
pose_prompt_map.crouching: crouching down, looking up at camera, playful perspective
pose_prompt_map.looking_back: looking back over shoulder while walking away
pose_prompt_map.hands_in_pockets: hands in pockets, casual confident stance, easy posture
pose_prompt_map.stretching: stretching arms or body, relaxed morning energy, organic movement

hair_presets: bob recto castano oscuro con flequillo suave
shag setentero con capas, castano miel
rulos definidos, largo hombros, castano rojizo
mono bajo desordenado con baby hairs
outfit_archetypes: romantico urbano (blusa con lazo + jeans oscuros)
